Finally the three prisoners at
Florence were prosecuted and SEN
fenced on the absurd charge OF
conspiracy to violate the neu-
trality of friendly nation"--a
charge not even suggested until
months after their arrest, and
which has here found its first ap-
plication in the United States.


Magon. Vallareal and Rivera
We're wanted in Mexico. Magon had
edited a paper at Mexico City in
which the Diaz government was
freely criticized. For this he was
thrown into Jail when a student
II years of age. Nillareal had
been secretary of the Mexican lib
eral party. Rivera was a speaker
of the Mexican liberal party. All
had come out of the liberal ele-
ment of the Mexican university,
and in their experience as at


toneys and in political life had


come to be looked upon by the


Diaz government as the nucleus
= OF dangerous opposition.
